title: normalize_phone — strip and reformat
prompt: Write a Python function with this exact signature:
- Remove every character that is not a digit.
- If fewer than 10 digits remain, return the string 'INVALID'.
- Otherwise take the LAST 10 digits and return them formatted as '(XXX) XXX-XXXX'.
Respond with a SINGLE Python code block (```python ... ```) defining normalize_phone
and nothing else. Include no explanation outside the code block.
difficulty_rationale: Small deterministic transform solvable with a regex or a comprehension plus slicing. Two hidden asserts (11-digit last-10 rule, empty string) reward reading the spec precisely. Expected high pass from medium up; low may slip on the last-10 or the <10 guard.
